name: pipeline-forecast
description: Pipeline intelligence plugin for Ironclad sales. Two modes: (1) /bootstrap-pipeline for first-time setup — creates Notion database and builds deep 90-day dossiers for every deal. (2) /run-forecast for weekly runs — reads prior Notion dossiers, looks back 7 days, updates incrementally. Both modes dispatch sub-agents with isolated context windows (one per deal) to prevent quality degradation across 30-40 deals. Also supports /analyze-deal for single-deal ad-hoc analysis.
